Module CST239Milestone
Package model

Class SalableProduct

  • java.lang.Object
    • model.SalableProduct
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    Armor, Health, Weapon
    public class SalableProduct
extends java.lang.Object
    Represents a product that can be sold in the store. This class models the core data for an item available in inventory. Each product has a name, description, price, and quantity in stock. The name acts as the identifier for equality comparisons in this version of the application.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      SalableProduct​(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String description, java.math.BigDecimal price, int quantity)
      Creates a new SalableProduct with validated input.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void decreaseStock​(int amount)
      Decreases the available stock by the specified amount.
      boolean equals​(java.lang.Object o)
      Products are considered equal if their names match (case-insensitive).
      java.lang.String getDescription()
      Returns the product description.
      java.lang.String getName()
      Returns the product name.
      java.math.BigDecimal getPrice()
      Returns the current price of the product.
      int getQuantity()
      Returns the quantity currently in stock.
      int hashCode()
      Hash code is derived from the lowercase name to remain consistent with equals().
      void increaseStock​(int amount)
      Increases the available stock.
      void setDescription​(java.lang.String description)
      Updates the product description.
      void setPrice​(java.math.BigDecimal price)
      Sets the product price.
      void setQuantity​(int quantity)
      Sets the stock quantity.
      java.lang.String toString()
      Returns a formatted string representation of the product.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        getClass, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • SalableProduct

        public SalableProduct​(java.lang.String name,
                      java.lang.String description,
                      java.math.BigDecimal price,
                      int quantity)
        Creates a new SalableProduct with validated input. Validation is done here to guarantee that no product is ever created in an invalid state.
        Parameters:
        name - Product name (cannot be null or blank)
        description - Product description (null becomes empty string)
        price - Product price (must be >= 0)
        quantity - Quantity in stock (must be >= 0)

    • Method Detail

      • getName

        public java.lang.String getName()
        Returns the product name.
        Returns:
        product name

      • getDescription

        public java.lang.String getDescription()
        Returns the product description.
        Returns:
        product description

      • setDescription

        public void setDescription​(java.lang.String description)
        Updates the product description. Null values are converted to an empty string to avoid null checks elsewhere.
        Parameters:
        description - new description

      • getPrice

        public java.math.BigDecimal getPrice()
        Returns the current price of the product.
        Returns:
        price as BigDecimal

      • setPrice

        public void setPrice​(java.math.BigDecimal price)
        Sets the product price. Price must be non-null and non-negative. The value is normalized to two decimal places to represent currency properly.
        Parameters:
        price - price value

      • getQuantity

        public int getQuantity()
        Returns the quantity currently in stock.
        Returns:
        quantity available

      • setQuantity

        public void setQuantity​(int quantity)
        Sets the stock quantity. Quantity cannot be negative. This ensures inventory integrity.
        Parameters:
        quantity - number of units in stock

      • decreaseStock

        public void decreaseStock​(int amount)
        Decreases the available stock by the specified amount. This method prevents inventory from going below zero.
        Parameters:
        amount - amount to subtract

      • increaseStock

        public void increaseStock​(int amount)
        Increases the available stock. Used when restocking or canceling a purchase.
        Parameters:
        amount - amount to add

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Returns a formatted string representation of the product. This is used when printing inventory in the console application.
        Overrides:
        toString in class java.lang.Object

      • equals

        public boolean equals​(java.lang.Object o)
        Products are considered equal if their names match (case-insensitive). This supports using the product name as a logical identifier.
        Overrides:
        equals in class java.lang.Object

      • hashCode

        public int hashCode()
        Hash code is derived from the lowercase name to remain consistent with equals().
        Overrides:
        hashCode in class java.lang.Object
